mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_event_log (group_id, user_id, event_type, event_content, event_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{groupId},#{userId},#{eventType},#{eventContent},NOW(),0)
mapper.select: SELECT l.id as alarmId, u.nickname as memberName, l.content as medicineName, DATE_FORMAT(l.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as alarmTime FROM t_family_event_log l LEFT JOIN t_user u ON l.user_id = u.id WHERE l.group_id = #{groupId} AND l.event_type = 'ALARM_MISSED' AND l.create_time >= CURDATE() ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
